race.comment: SATONO JASMINE (5) has obliterated her rivals in her last two outings and finds another suitable race. Obviously tougher here but is live hat-trick chance. DEEP PLEASURE (2) is yet to strike through this prep but has been catching the eye with some strong finishes. Will likely get back again from her draw and be hoping they overdo it in front. Mile suits. FULL HAO (1) found the line nicely at big odds in her first two runs back but failed to meet firm market expectations last time at Canterbury. Grima reunites with her 2kg claim. Worth another look. SPRING BLOSSOM (11) has made the perfect start to her career and deserves her shot in town. Can't underestimate.
